content:
# Session 23 (iter-023) — review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry: SNAP 5 → 5 (flat; global 9 → 9). Build GREEN (2439 jobs). All probed decls axiom-clean
  (`[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`).
- Target: `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (B6) via **ROOT-CAUSE REFACTOR** of `tensorPowAdd`.
- 23 edits, 6 goal checks, 7 diagnostics; 1 file (`SectionGradedRing.lean`).

## Headline: the 6-iter braided wall is DISSOLVED at its source
iter-022 set a HARD GATE ("escalate to USER if sorry stays 5"). The planner **overrode it via Standing
directive #1** (autonomous refactor-out-of-dead-ends) and ran a root-cause refactor instead — endorsed by
progress-critic (STUCK → refactor is the correct corrective TYPE), strategy-critic (CHALLENGE, pivot
SOUND), and mathlib-analogist `tensorpowadd-orient` (PROCEED / NECESSARY, `lean_run_code`-verified).

**Root cause:** `tensorPowAdd` recursed on the **1st** index `m` while `tensorPow` grows right and
`Nat.add` recurses on its 2nd arg ⇒ the succ clause was forced to thread `tensorBraiding L (tensorPow L m')`
to migrate the freshly-added `L`. **Fix:** recurse on the **2nd** index `m'` (canonical `pow_add`
orientation) ⇒ the new `L` stays at the right edge of source AND target ⇒ **NO braiding, NO `eqToIso`**
(`m+0=m`, `m+(c+1)=(m+c)+1` both `rfl`). The succ obligation of `tensorPowAdd_assoc` is now a pure
braiding-free categorified-`pow_add` pentagon.

## Solved this iter (all axiom-clean, lean-auditor + lvbc confirmed)
- **`tensorPowAdd` re-signed** braiding-free (def @2147): `match m' with | 0 => tensorObjRightUnitor … |
  (c+1) => (tensorObjAssoc …).symm ≪≫ tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd L m c) L`.
- **`tensorPowAdd_zero_right` = `rfl`** (now the literal base clause) and **`tensorPowAdd_succ` = `rfl`**
  (the `(c+1)` arm). Both genuine `rfl` (auditor verified).
- **`tensorPowAdd_zero_left` FULLY CLOSED (NEW)** — the left-unit coherence (no longer the base clause).
  Induction on `n`; succ = `leftUnitor_tensor` fold + new helper `tensorObjIso_succ_reindex` (`subst h;
  simp`) for the `0+c=c` reindex residue. (Mid-proof type-mismatch on the `eqToHom` motive fixed by
  re-typing the reindexer to `congrArg (fun i => tensorObj (tensorPow L i) L) h`.)
- **`sectionsMul_one_mul` + `sectionsMul_mul_one` repaired** — `one_mul` via `tensorPowAdd_zero_left`;
  `mul_one` collapses to a `rfl`-chain (`tensorPowAdd_zero_right` is now `rfl`).
- **New helpers:** `tensorObjIso_succ_reindex`; `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorObj` (hand-built analogue
  of `MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight_tensor`: `e ▷ (A⊗B) = α⁻¹ ≪≫ ((e▷A)▷B) ≪≫ α`).
- **`tensorPowAdd_assoc` BASE case (`m''=0`) closed** — braiding-free ρ-naturality (`htri` + double
  `rightUnitor_naturality` slide + `rfl`).
- **Retired** the entire 018–022 braided σ-naturality/diamond tower
  (`tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_tensorBraiding_natural`, `…_succ_{reindex,interchange,coherence}`,
  `tensorPowAdd_reindex_fst`).

## Partial / still open
- **`tensorPowAdd_assoc` succ (B6, sorry @3230)** — groundwork compiles; goal CONFIRMED braiding-free.
  Blocker: the iso-level `Iso.trans_assoc`/`Iso.self_symm_id_assoc` that would cancel the `α'' ≪≫ α''.symm`
  pair is blocked by the trailing **dependently-typed `eqToIso(add_assoc m m' (c+1))`** (ill-typed motive,
  "pattern not found"). This is NOT a comp-instance diamond (`← Iso.trans_assoc` fires). **VALIDATED
  unblock route, proven THIS iter on the sibling `tensorPowAdd_zero_left` succ:** `apply Iso.ext` → drop to
  hom level (`eqToIso→eqToHom`, `α''.hom ≫ α''.inv` cancels by `Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc` — no dependent-`≪≫`
  issue) → fold `ih`/`ihR` by `rw` → `congr 1` peel → `tensorObjIso_succ_reindex`-style `subst` for the
  `(m+m')+c=m+(m'+c)` reindexer → `monoidal`.
- **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7, @3260)** — gated solely on B6.
- **3 comm (@3278/3293/3335)** — deferred FUTURE; `sectionsMul_mul_comm` FALSE for general `L` (free tensor
  algebra), holds only `[IsInvertible L]`; no consumer.

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter023` — **0 must-fix**, faithful both directions; 7 decls checked, 0 red
  flags. Chapter describes the new 2nd-index braiding-free recursion throughout; old braided-tower blocks
  explicitly removed; no dangling `\lean{}` pins to retired helpers; `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc` sketch is now
  a pure pentagon. 2 minor (3 new helpers unpinned; pre-existing `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`
  NOTE). Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter023.md`.
- **lean-auditor** `iter023` — **0 critical / 3 major / 1 minor**. All `rfl` claims genuine; all newly-closed
  decls axiom-clean; all 5 sorries honest + un-weakened; no `maxHeartbeats 1e6`, no `axiom`, no laundering.
  3 major = **stale comments / dead code** (NOT proof defects): stale planner-strategy block @2077–2138 +
  `tensorPowAdd` docstring @2142–2146 (both describe the OLD braiding recursion); **`canonical_runit_core`
  @2964 is now DEAD** (only call site eliminated). 1 minor = stale "single remaining gap" comment @3082.
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter023.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
**Override rationale:** `sync_leanok` (iter 23, sha 4644c7b) over-stripped `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`
again (removed 24 / added 1) — the **10th recurrence** of the known heartbeat-glitch over-strip — dropping
proof-block `\leanok` to 1, AND left a **build-breaking corruption** (blueprint-doctor: `\)` without
matching `\(` @1543). The build is GREEN with exactly 5 sorried decls + spot `lean_verify` axiom-clean, so
the strip is demonstrably wrong. Repaired (exclusion principle: restore every proof block upstream of /
independent of the 5 sorries):
- **Restored proof-block `\leanok` on 24 axiom-clean blocks** @ L405, 612, 653, 734, 819, 850, 880, 909,
  936, 974, 1116, 1143, 1175, 1489, 1519, 1544, 1615, 1669, 1699, 1737, 1780, 1811, 1877, 1954, 1974
  (now 25 proof-block `\leanok` total). Includes this iter's wins (`tensorPowAdd_zero_left` @1175,
  `sectionsMul_*_one`/coherence partners).
- **Repaired the corruption @1544** (`tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul` proof): restored the eaten opening
  `\(\Gamma(\beta_{\mathcal{F},\mathcal{G}}) \circ …` math delimiter + `\leanok`. Clears the doctor's only
  malformed-annotation finding for this chapter.
- **Left correctly BARE** the 5 sorried blocks (`tensorPowAdd_assoc` @1376, comm @1249/1313, multi-pin
  coherence @2087 which includes sorried `mul_assoc`/`mul_comm`) and 3 unscaffolded blocks (gsemiring /
  gcommSemiring / gmodule @2230/2306/2371, `\lean{}` targets absent).
No `\mathlibok` / `\lean{}` / `\notready` changes this iter.

## Notes (LOW)
- Pervasive `\begin{lemma}\n\n\leanok\n[Title]` statement-block placement (≈35 sites) renders the
  `[Title]` as body text rather than the optional title arg — pre-existing house-style artifact, not
  build-breaking (doctor silent); left untouched.
